raw.message:
Blink and they’re gone.
Bacon & Cheese, Deluxe, or Steakhouse Bacon build your box of 2 or 6.

hook.summary: Friends socializing in a lounge with a box of sliders in the foreground.
hook.visual_action: The camera focuses on a box of six sliders on a table while blurred friends eat and drink in the background.

scene_flow: Establishing shot of friends hanging out with a full box of sliders in the foreground.
The sliders begin to disappear from the box as the friends in the background grab them.
The Burger King logo and 'King-Sized Sliders Box' text appear over the scene.
A hand reaches in to take the final slider from the box as the branding remains on screen.
on_screen_text: Only at select restaurants in Portland, OR and Columbus, OH. Limited time, while supplies last. TM & (c) 2016 Burger King Company LLC.
audience_proxy: Young adults and social groups looking for shareable, casual fast food meals.
